column1: # (A) Parallel speedup on the real C. acnes 64-genome panel, 14 enzymes.
# STRAND-FIXED binary (both-strand digestion, ~2x markers; ~2x slower than pre-fix but correct).
# (B) DB build scaling vs genome count (synthetic genomes, 16 threads). PRE-FIX numbers below
# (forward-only); the shape (near-linear, MinHash above 96) is unchanged by the strand fix, but
# absolute times are ~2x larger with both-strand digestion. Not re-measured (synthetic).
